---
title: "Gnarwarre2024 Notebook"
output: html_notebook
---
# Libraries
```{r, warning=FALSE}
library(targets)
library(tidyverse)
library(visNetwork)
library(this.path)
```

```{r}
#setwd(dirname(rstudioapi::getActiveDocumentContext()$path))
setwd(this.path::this.dir())
getwd()
```


# Check pipeline status
```{r}
tar_glimpse()
```


```{r}
tar_visnetwork()
```


```{r}
tar_visnetwork(targets_only = TRUE)
```

```{r}
tar_manifest()
tar_manifest(fields = name)$name
```

# Construct pipeline
```{r}
# targets::tar_make(callr_function = NULL) # for debugging
targets::tar_make()
```

# Destroy pipeline (off by default)
```{r, warning=FALSE, eval = FALSE }
tar_destroy()
# targets::tar_destroy(ask = FALSE)

```


# Run pipeline and save pipeline logs (ideal final run)
- Re-runs all pipeline
- Prints log with all warnings
```{r}
targets::tar_destroy(ask = FALSE)
targets::tar_make(
  callr_arguments = list(
    stdout = "pipeline_log.txt",
    stderr = "pipeline_log.txt"
  )
)
```


# -----------------------------------------------------
# Debugging and other miscelaneous functionalities below 
#------------------------------------------------------

# Get soil parameters in json format
```{r}
tar_read(json_soil_water)
x<-tar_read(df_obs_renamed)
names(x)
x<-tar_read(df_obs_mean)
names(x)
x<-tar_read(df_obs_plus_pheno_hi_amounts)
names(x)
x %>% dplyr::select("Wheat.Stem.N", "Wheat.Spike.N") %>% summary()
```

```{r}
tar_load(df_apsimStageInput_haunBased)
x<-tar_read(df_new_obs_fixed)
x %>%
  filter(Wheat.Phenology.CurrentStageName == "HarvestRipe") %>%
  dplyr::select(SimulationName, Wheat.Phenology.CurrentStageName, Wheat.Grain.Wt)
```
